name: Dutch Pot Pie
recipeInstructions:
1. Beat the eggs and add milk, cream, soda, salt, and melted butter. Mix well.
2. Gradually add flour until the dough is stiff enough to roll out. (You may need up to 4 cups of flour).
3. Roll out the dough on a floured surface and line a cooking pot with it.
4. Place a large piece of butter at the bottom of the pot, then layer peeled and quartered potatoes alternately with small pieces of dough.
5. Top with more potato slices, then sprinkle with salt, pepper, and minced parsley.
6. Dot with additional butter.
7. Add 1 1/2 to 2 cups water.
8. Bake at 350°F for about 3 hours.
